title: Comments — diskusi per lesson
description: Per-lesson discussion (fase-2, STATUS #16) for belajar-with-rahmanef.com. Members of the lesson's tenant post comments and depth-1 replies (parentId must be a ROOT comment of the same lesson — enforced in the mutation, VALIDATION_FAILED otherwise); soft delete by the author or instructor+ sets deletedAt and reads project a placeholder — the body never leaks after deletion (P0, asserted in tests). tenantId always derives from the lesson row, never from args. Light anti-spam: per-user-per-lesson cap via the by_lesson index. Adapted from the rr `comments` slice (threaded pattern) simplified to a fixed depth-1 model on our own schema. One mounted view: LessonComments({ lessonId }).

peers.reason: delete confirm on the mandatory dialog primitive

os-shell: lesson window-app, under the lesson content ← <LessonComments lessonId={lesson._id} />
